sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْجَدُّ: «مَنْ حَفَرَ بِئْرًا لِأَخِيهِ وَقَعَ فِيهِ».
sentences.translation: Djed je rekao: «Ko iskopa jamu za brata svoga, u nju će upasti».
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather said: «Whoever digs a pit for his brother will fall into it».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ مَنْ يُؤْذِي الآخَرِينَ سَيُؤْذِي نَفْسَهُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da će onaj ko povrijedi druge, povrijediti i sebe.
sentences.translationEn: This means that whoever harms others will harm himself.

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلَ غُلَامٌ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ كِتَابَ صَدِيقِهِ بِدُونِ إِذْنٍ.
sentences.translation: Dječak je pokušao uzeti knjgu svog prijatelja bez dozvole.
sentences.translationEn: A boy tried to take his friend's book without permission.

sentences.translation: Izgubio je povjerenje prijatelja i osjetio kajanje.
sentences.translationEn: He lost his friend's trust and felt regret.
